title: Stanbic IBTC Bank Nigeria PMI: Business activity falls for first time in eight months - FinancialEDGE
description: The Nigerian private sector moved back into contraction territory in July as steep price pressures hit demand and resulted in renewed reductions in both business activity and new orders. Input costs and selling prices continued to rise rapidly, although there were some signs that efforts to secure sales resulted in a softer pace of output
html: The Nigerian private sector moved back into contraction  territory in July as steep price pressures hit demand and  resulted in renewed reductions in both business activity  and new orders.
